firstVisitSteps.title: Book Online
firstVisitSteps.description: Have an ACC claim? Bring your number. New injury? We can claim an ACC number for you.

firstVisitSteps.title: Treatment Plan
firstVisitSteps.description: Combine treatment with lifestyle and exercise advice tailored to you.

servicesIntro.title: Osteopathy
servicesIntro.description: Osteopathy is suitable for all ages — from newborns to seniors — using hands-on techniques to restore balance, improve mobility, and support your body's natural ability to heal. Whether you're managing chronic pain, recovering from injury, or simply looking to move and feel better, we tailor every treatment to you.

servicesIntro.title: Acupuncture
servicesIntro.description: Acupuncture works by stimulating specific points on the body to restore the flow of energy, release tension, and activate your body's natural healing response. Whether approached through a Traditional Chinese Medicine or modern evidence-based lens, it's an effective treatment for pain, stress, sleep, and a wide range of health concerns.

servicesIntro.title: Herbal Medicine
servicesIntro.description: Drawing on thousands of years of Traditional Chinese Medicine, herbal medicine uses carefully balanced plant-based formulas to support your body's natural healing from the inside out. Our practitioners create personalised prescriptions to help with a wide range of concerns — from pain and fatigue to digestive health, stress, and hormonal balance.

ctaHeading: Ready to start your journey to pain relief?
practitionersIntro: Our team offers personalised, holistic care designed around you. By combining osteopathy, herbal medicine, and acupuncture, we support pain relief and promote better overall wellbeing.

faq.question: Do I need a GP referral?
faq.answer: No GP referral is needed for osteopathy or acupuncture appointments. You can book directly online or by calling us. If you have an ACC claim, bring the number for your first visit.

faq.question: How many sessions will I need?
faq.answer: This varies depending on your condition. Many patients notice improvement after 1-3 sessions. During your first consultation, we'll discuss a treatment plan tailored to your needs.

faq.question: What should I wear to my appointment?
faq.answer: Wear comfortable, loose-fitting clothing that allows easy movement. We may need to examine and treat areas around your complaint, so clothing you can move easily in is ideal.

faq.question: What's the difference between osteopath, physiotherapist and chiropractor?
faq.answer: While all three focus on musculoskeletal health, they differ in approach. Osteopathy takes a whole-body view, looking at how your muscles, joints, nerves, and organs interconnect — using hands-on techniques like joint mobilisation, soft tissue work, and cranial therapy. Physiotherapy tends to focus on rehabilitation through targeted exercises and movement retraining. Chiropractic care centres primarily on spinal alignment and joint adjustments. At Meridian Osteopathy, we blend osteopathic principles with acupuncture and herbal medicine for a truly holistic approach to your health.

faq.question: Is acupuncture painful?
faq.answer: Most patients find acupuncture comfortable. The needles are very fine and any sensation is usually brief — many people feel deeply relaxed during treatment.

faq.question: Do you treat children?
faq.answer: Yes, osteopathy is safe and effective for all ages, including infants and children. Techniques are adapted to be gentle and appropriate for younger patients.

faq.question: What conditions do you treat?
faq.answer: We treat a wide range of conditions including back and neck pain, headaches, joint issues, sports injuries, stress, fatigue, digestive concerns, women's health and pregnancy related issues. If you're unsure, feel free to get in touch.
